summary.intent: Fix new review comments on PR #525 (moltis-org/moltis) related to GPG release verification tooling, and resolve the review conversations.
summary.outcome: Identified one new unresolved review thread and fixed the GPG key import logic in verify-release.sh to show all output and not fail if the key already exists. Fix was committed.

repo: PR #525 adds GPG release signing/verification tooling: scripts/verify-release.sh, release-verification.md, and gpg-sign-release.sh
GPG key is hosted at https://pen.so/gpg.asc and imported via curl pipeline
Review threads from the greptile bot were the primary source of feedback on this PR

code.finding: GPG key import should not fail if key already exists — output should be shown unconditionally rather than suppressed or treated as an error

workflow: First pass at checking PR comments returned false negative (no new comments found); a second attempt with different gh API calls surfaced the actual unresolved thread
Resolving GitHub review conversations requires explicitly marking threads as resolved after pushing the fix

friction: Initial gh API query for unresolved threads returned no results despite one existing, requiring multiple different query approaches to surface it
